metadata.title: New Features Through August 2023
metadata.description:
These are the new features introduced from June through August 2023 for AIOps for
        NGFW Free, and for AIOps for NGFW Premium.
metadata.keywords: Cloud Management of NGFWs, Cloud Management and AIOps for NGFW, PANW Yellow Theme, New Feature, AIOps for NGFW, Strata Cloud Manager

metadata.title: New Features in December 2023
metadata.description:
These are the new features introduced in December 2023 for AIOps for NGFW Free, and
        for AIOps for NGFW Premium.
metadata.keywords: Cloud Management and AIOps for NGFW, PANW Yellow Theme, AIOps for NGFW, December 2023, Release Notes, Strata Cloud Manager

metadata.title: New Features in March 2024
metadata.description:
These are the new features introduced in March 2024 for AIOps for NGFW Free, and for
        AIOps for NGFW Premium.
metadata.keywords: Cloud Management and AIOps for NGFW, PANW Yellow Theme, NGFW Release Notes, Release Notes, March 2024, Strata Cloud Manager

        AIOps for NGFW Premium.

metadata.title: New Features in August 2024
metadata.description:
These are the new features introduced in August 2024 for AIOps for NGFW Free, and for
        AIOps for NGFW Premium.

metadata.title: New Features in April 2024
metadata.description:
These are the new features introduced in April 2024 for AIOps for NGFW Free, and for
        AIOps for NGFW Premium.
metadata.keywords: Cloud Management and AIOps for NGFW, April 2024, Release Notes, Cloud Management of NGFWs, PANW Yellow Theme, NGFW Release Notes, Strata Cloud Manager

# New Features in April 2024
